revisions.*: Because "rvslots" was not specified, a legacy format has been used for the output. This format is deprecated, and in the future the new format will always be used.

'''5-2-225

Alternative term: Set point (U.S.A.)

The value chosen under prescribed conditions for the purpose of adjusting the controller. If the system has no offset, the set value is identical with the desired value. 

[[Image:Ch5_Fig3.jpg|400px]]

Figure 3 - Typical time response of a system to a step increase of input.

Reference: I.E.C. (modified)

{{IALAFooter}}
